name: Barbara Ann
description: Five rounds of handstand push-ups, deadlifts, sit-ups, and double-unders, with a mandatory three-minute rest between rounds — a four-movement update to Barbara's rest-interval format.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
